title: Seele didnt give a f about losing the Nebuchadnezzar key
display_title: Seele didnt give a f about losing the Nebuchadnezzar key
wikitext:
[]: Seele didn't give a f*** about "losing" the Nebuchadnezzar key. Post by The_Max » Fri Dec 06, 2019 7:52 pm Something so important to Gendo (he even go to the bathroom with it) but Seele could not care less about that item getting "lost". In addition, they don't realize Gendo has it after 15 years...

[]: Re: Seele didn't give a f*** about "losing" the Nebuchadnezzar key. Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 07, 2019 12:49 am Kaji very specifically says that Seele were keeping it as a "spare". Their intended version of HIP involved Mark.06 and Lilith. Gendo's is rather more convoluted. Also, the reason Seele weren't looking for the Key may simply have been because Bethany Base got blown up.

[]: Re: Seele didn't give a f*** about "losing" the Nebuchadnezzar key. Post by The_Max » Sat Dec 07, 2019 6:49 am Reichu wrote: Kaji very specifically says that Seele were keeping it as a "spare". Their intended version of HIP involved Mark.06 and Lilith. Gendo's is rather more convoluted. Also, the reason Seele weren't looking for the Key may simply have been because Bethany Base got blown up.

[]: Re: Seele didn't give a f*** about "losing" the Nebuchadnezzar key. Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 07, 2019 7:05 am The key is the thing inside the briefcase. The case itself was probably supplied by Kaji when he smuggled the key out of containment.

[]: Re: Seele didn't give a f*** about "losing" the Nebuchadnezzar key. Post by The_Max » Sat Dec 07, 2019 4:13 pm Reichu wrote: The key is the thing inside the briefcase. The case itself was probably supplied by Kaji when he smuggled the key out of containment.

[]: Re: Seele didn't give a f*** about "losing" the Nebuchadnezzar key. Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 07, 2019 6:37 pm It seems like you had your mind made up when you created the thread and never intended to engage in anything but a bad faith argument, but maybe that's just me...

[]: Re: Seele didn't give a f*** about "losing" the Nebuchadnezzar key. Post by Akko » Sat Dec 07, 2019 7:47 pm *cinema sins intensifies*

[]: Re: Seele didn't give a f*** about "losing" the Nebuchadnezzar key. Post by The_Max » Sat Dec 07, 2019 8:03 pm Reichu wrote: It seems like you had your mind made up when you created the thread and never intended to engage in anything but a bad faith argument, but maybe that's just me...

[]: Re: Seele didn't give a f*** about "losing" the Nebuchadnezzar key. Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 07, 2019 11:52 pm An extremely weak use of "NO YOU". You marched in here and made an utterly bare-bones excuse for a thread with no intention of having an actual discussion, which is not how things are done around here, which is why I have criticised you. People responding to a thread with alternative explanations to consider is, on the other hand, proper behavior. If you want to have bad faith non-discussions about what you are already convinced is bad writing, you can do it somewhere else.
